title: Google Just Dropped The Singularity Bomb
summary: Google DeepMind leadership suggests humanity may be entering the "foothills of the singularity" as AI agents demonstrate practical utility in coding, research, and scientific discovery. The video surveys recent advances including Gemini for Science, autonomous agent payment systems, protein modeling, and mathematical theorem proving, arguing that imperfect but useful AI has already begun accelerating workflows across multiple domains.
